message:
fix: grant Write/Edit/Glob/Grep tools to mission agent (#8617)

The Claude Code provider was restricted to Bash+Read only, preventing
missions from creating files (AGENTS.md, workflows) or opening PRs.
Add Write, Edit, Glob, Grep so ACMM missions can add feedback loops
to repos.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
